initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' 
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 1
FROM attendance
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id
JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Maya'
  AND member.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND event.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
  AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' 
  AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 1
FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Maya'
  AND member.last_name = 'Mclean'
  AND event.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 'Yes' AS attendance_status
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM member m
            JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
            JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
            WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
              AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' 
              AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended

candidates.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS attendance_status
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS attendance_status
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM member m
            JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
            JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
            WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' 
              AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' 
              AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS attended
